posts.author: Kmullins463 (Kim)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am a new user and am loving Monday.com. I am trying to replace a manual process of an assistant sending us a daily recap of all that was completed. How can I do this by using Monday.com?

I see I can send an email per task completed, but I am looking for 1 email with all tasks completed for that day.

Any Suggestions?
